name: @streamer/desktop
description: Electron shell for the Streamer web app

scripts.prepackage:dir: npm run build --workspace=@streamer/stream-server && npm run build && npm run vendor
scripts.prepackage:mac: npm run build --workspace=@streamer/stream-server && npm run build && npm run vendor
scripts.predev: npm run build --workspace=@streamer/stream-server && npm run build
scripts.prestart: npm run build --workspace=@streamer/stream-server && npm run build
